title: Airport Intelligence
description: Travel chaos, timing, and first-contact predictions.

questions.text: Who first guessed the correct departure delay?
Who nailed the gate change before the announcement?
Who predicted the groom would miss breakfast?
Who guessed the exact midday temperature?
Who called the first sunscreen failure?
Who correctly predicted the windy boat segment?

title: Night Shift Tactics
description: Bar order, stamina, and timing under pressure.

questions.text: Who identified the strongest opening bar move?
Who guessed the exact minute of the first regroup?
Who predicted the final taxi debate winner?

title: Wedding Propaganda
description: Active round waiting to be scored live.

questions.text: Who writes the strongest fake best-man speech opening line?
Who estimates the exact toast count before midnight?
Who picks the groom walkout song correctly?

title: Recovery Economics
description: Draft category for the morning after.

questions.text: Who predicts the first breakfast order?
Who gets closest to total coffees consumed?
Who names the first person to ask for a nap?
